text:
NAME: INTRAOCULAR_LENS_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount (REV-CNTR-TOT-CHRG-
AMT) associated with revenue center code (REV CNTR CD) '0276' from all claim records included in the 
stay. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
